title: CUSAT Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Security Guard Posts
description: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 22 Security Guard Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can use this chance and apply for the CUSAT Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can al...
